articles.title: War with Iran chokes flows of oil and natural gas, highlighting energy security risks for Asia - AP News
articles.description: The war with Iran is disrupting oil and LNG shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, a key artery for global energy trade, sending prices higher and threatening global growth. The risks are highest for countries in Asia. Japan, South Korea and Taiwan depend he…

articles.title: RFK Jr.’s dunk on Dunkin’ riles up New Englanders: ‘Come and take it’ - The Washington Post
articles.description: “We’re going to ask Dunkin’ Donuts and Starbucks, ‘Show us the safety data that show that it’s okay for a teenage girl to drink an iced coffee with 115 grams of sugar in it,’” the health secretary said recently.

articles.title: Korean Stocks to Bounce, US Inflation Fears Ease: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Asian equities rebounded, with South Korea leading gains after its worst rout on record, as sentiment showed signs of a recovery following an initial bout of volatility sparked by the Middle East conflict.

articles.title: Tim Sweeney signed away his right to criticize Google until 2032 - The Verge
articles.description: Epic CEO Tim Sweeney signed away Epic’s rights to sue and disparage the company and his right to advocate for any further changes to Google’s app store polices.

articles.description: Netflix CFO Spence Neumann, speaking Wednesday at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference, reiterated the company's position that it bailed out of the bidding for Warner Bros. because Paramount increased its offer price.
